interactions.name: Mefloquine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Sulthiame can be decreased when used in combination with Mefloquine.

interactions.name: Pregabalin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Sulthiame can be decreased when used in combination with Pregabalin.

interactions.name: Mianserin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Sulthiame can be decreased when used in combination with Mianserin.

interactions.name: Orlistat
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Sulthiame can be decreased when it is combined with Orlistat.
